name: ITSM Operations
description: Alex IT Ops — an autonomous ITIL 4-aligned digital worker orchestrating 23 child workers across Incident, Change, Problem, Knowledge, Asset/CMDB, SLA, Security, FinOps, Release, Monitoring, and more. Dashboards rendered in Fluent UI v9. Grounded in ITIL 4 and NIST 800-53. Connects to ServiceNow, Microsoft 365, and Azure services.

conversation_starters.title: Morning Briefing
conversation_starters.text: Give me my ITSM operations briefing. What needs my attention across incidents, problems, changes, and SLAs?

conversation_starters.title: Incident Dashboard
conversation_starters.text: Show me the incident dashboard. Are there any P1s or P2s that need immediate attention?

conversation_starters.title: P1 War Room
conversation_starters.text: Open the major incident bridge — show me all active P1/P2 incidents and their blast radius.

conversation_starters.title: Change Dashboard
conversation_starters.text: Show me the change dashboard with risk scores. Any collisions or high-risk changes?

conversation_starters.title: SLA Compliance
conversation_starters.text: Show me the SLA compliance dashboard. Which SLAs are breached or at risk?

conversation_starters.title: CAB Prep
conversation_starters.text: Generate the CAB agenda for this week. Include risk scores, collisions, and recommendations.

conversation_starters.title: Knowledge Search
conversation_starters.text: Search the knowledge base for Oracle failover procedures and related runbooks.

conversation_starters.title: FinOps Snapshot
conversation_starters.text: Show me the FinOps dashboard with Azure cost anomalies, right-sizing candidates, and budget forecast.

conversation_starters.title: Problem Dashboard
conversation_starters.text: Show me the problem management dashboard with open problems and known errors.

conversation_starters.title: EOL Risk Check
conversation_starters.text: Check end-of-life status for Windows Server 2019 and show the lifecycle risk.

conversation_starters.title: Seed Demo Data
conversation_starters.text: Seed the ServiceNow dev instance with realistic ITSM demo data for a walkthrough.

conversation_starters.title: Audit Trail
conversation_starters.text: Show me the audit trail — what actions has Alex taken in the last 24 hours?
